headline: DXCM Secures Health Canada Authorization for Dexcom G7 15 Day CGM
summary: DexCom's G7 15 Day wins Health Canada authorization, offering longer wear, high accuracy and smart features for adults with diabetes.

raw.headline: DXCM Secures Health Canada Authorization for Dexcom G7 15 Day CGM

headline: 1 Mid-Cap Stock to Target This Week and 2 We Find Risky
summary: Mid-cap stocks have the best odds of scaling into $100 billion corporations thanks to their tested business models and large addressable markets. But the many opportunities in front of them attract significant competition, spanning from industry behemoths with seemingly infinite resources to small, nimble players with chips on their shoulders.

headline: Global Blood Glucose Monitoring System Market Size to Reach USD 39.4 Billion by 2035 | Growing at 8.9% CAGR | Industry Trends, Market Share & Forecast – Custom Market Insights
summary: [220+ Pages Latest Report] According to a market research study published by Custom Market Insights, the demand analysis of Global Blood Glucose Monitoring System Market size & share revenue was valued at approximately USD 16.8 Billion in 2025 and is expected to reach USD 18.3 Billion in 2026 and is expected to reach around USD 39.4 Billion by 2035, at a CAGR of 8.9% between 2026 and 2035.
